title: Red Hat Security Advisory: binutils security update
overview:
An update for binutils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: binutils security update

An update for binutils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for binutils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
binutils-2.30-128.el8_10.src.rpm
binutils-2.30-128.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-debuginfo-2.30-128.el8_10.i686.rpm
binutils-debuginfo-2.30-128.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-debugsource-2.30-128.el8_10.i686.rpm
binutils-debugsource-2.30-128.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-devel-2.30-128.el8_10.i686.rpm
binutils-devel-2.30-128.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
binutils-2.30-128.el8_10.s390x.rpm
binutils-debuginfo-2.30-128.el8_10.s390x.rpm
binutils-debugsource-2.30-128.el8_10.s390x.rpm
binutils-devel-2.30-128.el8_10.s390x.rpm
binutils-2.30-128.el8_10.ppc64le.rpm
binutils-debuginfo-2.30-128.el8_10.ppc64le.rpm
binutils-debugsource-2.30-128.el8_10.ppc64le.rpm
binutils-devel-2.30-128.el8_10.ppc64le.rpm
binutils-2.30-128.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
binutils-debuginfo-2.30-128.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
binutils-debugsource-2.30-128.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
binutils-devel-2.30-128.el8_10.aarch64.rpm

CVE-2025-11083: A vulnerability has been found in GNU Binutils 2.45. The affected element is the function elf_swap_shdr in the library bfd/elfcode.h of the component Linker. The manipulation leads to heap-based buffer overflow. The attack must be carried out locally. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The identifier of the patch is 9ca499644a21ceb3f946d1c179c38a83be084490. To fix this issue, it is recommended to deploy a patch. The code maintainer replied with "[f]ixed for 2.46".
